import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { getHouseListings } from '../services/api'; import styles from './ResultsPage.module.css'; function ResultsPage() { const location = useLocation(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [listings, setListings] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [searchCriteria, setSearchCriteria] = useState(null); const [selectedListing, setSelectedListing] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('details'); useEffect(() => { const formData = location.state?.formData; const price = location.state?.price; if (!formData || !price) { navigate('/'); return; } fetchListings({ ...formData, price }); }, [location, navigate]); const fetchListings = async (formData) => { setLoading(true); const data = await getHouseListings(formData); if (data.success) { setListings(data.listings); setSearchCriteria(data.search_criteria); } setLoading(false); }; const handleBack = () => { navigate('/'); }; const handleContact = (listing) => { setSelectedListing(listing); }; const closeContactModal = () => { setSelectedListing(null); }; if (loading) { return (

Finding best properties for you...

); } return (
{/* Header */}

Available Properties

{searchCriteria && (

{searchCriteria.location} · {searchCriteria.bhk} BHK · {searchCriteria.price_range}

)}
{/* Listings Grid */}
{listings.map((listing) => (
{listing.availability}

{listing.title}

{listing.society}, {listing.location}

{listing.property_id}
{listing.availability} {listing.type} {listing.furnishing}
🏠
{listing.bhk} BHK
Configuration
📐
{listing.sqft} sqft
Built-up Area
📏
{listing.carpet_area} sqft
Carpet Area

{listing.description}

{/* Tabs for different sections */}
{activeTab === 'details' && (
🏢
Floor
{listing.floor}
🧭
Facing
{listing.facing}
📅
Year Built
{listing.year_built}
🚗
Parking
{listing.parking}
💧
Water
{listing.water_supply}
⚡
Power
{listing.power_backup}
)} {activeTab === 'features' && (
{listing.features.map((feature, idx) => (
✓ {feature}
))}
Flooring: {listing.flooring}
Ceiling Height: {listing.ceiling_height}
Pet Friendly: {listing.pet_friendly ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}
)} {activeTab === 'nearby' && (
{listing.nearby.map((place, idx) => { const [name, distance] = place.split(' - '); return (
📍
{name}
{distance}
); })}
)}
{listing.amenities.slice(0, 6).map((amenity, idx) => ( {amenity} ))}
Maintenance {listing.maintenance}
RERA Approved {listing.rera_approved ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}
Loan Available {listing.loan_available ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}

₹{listing.price} Lakhs

₹{listing.price_per_sqft}/sqft

))}
{/* Contact Modal */} {selectedListing && (
e.stopPropagation()}>

₹{selectedListing.price} Lakhs

📞 Call Now ✉️ Send Email
)}
); } export default ResultsPage;
